mapper.sql: id, auth_letter_id, doc_id, doc_name, doc_type, is_encrypted, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM auth_letter_attachment WHERE auth_letter_id = #{authLetterId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM auth_letter_attachment WHERE auth_letter_id = #{authLetterId} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM auth_letter_attachment WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_letter_attachment (auth_letter_id, doc_id, doc_name, doc_type, is_encrypted, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{authLetterId}, #{docId}, #{docName}, #{docType}, #{isEncrypted}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_letter_attachment SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE auth_letter_attachment SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
